mapper.select:
SELECT p.part_id, p.category_id, c.category_name, p.part_name, p.model_name, p.manufacturer, p.part_code, p.estimated_price, p.safe_quantity, COALESCE(s.quantity, 0) AS current_stock_quantity, p.active FROM tb_pc_part p JOIN tb_part_category c ON c.company_id = p.company_id AND c.category_id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN tb_part_stock s ON s.company_id = p.company_id AND s.part_id = p.part_id
ORDER BY p.part_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_pc_part p JOIN tb_part_category c ON c.company_id = p.company_id AND c.category_id = p.category_id

SELECT part_id, company_id, category_id, created_by, part_name, model_name, manufacturer, part_code, estimated_price, safe_quantity, active FROM tb_pc_part WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND part_id = #{partId}

SELECT p.part_id, p.category_id, c.category_name, p.part_name, p.model_name, p.manufacturer, p.part_code, p.estimated_price, p.safe_quantity, COALESCE(s.quantity, 0) AS current_stock_quantity, p.active FROM tb_pc_part p JOIN tb_part_category c ON c.company_id = p.company_id AND c.category_id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN tb_part_stock s ON s.company_id = p.company_id AND s.part_id = p.part_id WHERE p.company_id = #{companyId} AND p.part_id = #{partId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_pc_part ( company_id, category_id, created_by, part_name, model_name, manufacturer, part_code, estimated_price, safe_quantity, active, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{companyId}, #{categoryId}, #{createdBy}, #{partName}, #{modelName}, #{manufacturer}, #{partCode}, #{estimatedPrice}, #{safeQuantity}, #{active}, NOW(6), NOW(6) )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_pc_part SET category_id = #{categoryId}, part_name = #{partName}, model_name = #{modelName}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer}, part_code = #{partCode}, estimated_price = #{estimatedPrice}, safe_quantity = #{safeQuantity}, updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND part_id = #{partId}
mapper.select: SELECT v.spec_value_id, v.spec_definition_id, d.spec_key, d.spec_name, d.input_type, d.unit, v.value_number, v.value_text, v.value_boolean, v.selected_option_id, v.selected_option_label_snapshot AS selected_option_label, v.selected_option_value_snapshot AS selected_option_value FROM tb_part_spec_value v JOIN tb_part_spec_definition d ON d.company_id = v.company_id AND d.spec_definition_id = v.spec_definition_id WHERE v.company_id = #{companyId} AND v.part_id = #{partId} ORDER BY d.sort_order ASC, d.spec_definition_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_part_spec_value ( company_id, part_id, spec_definition_id, value_text, value_number, value_boolean, selected_option_id, selected_option_label_snapshot, selected_option_value_snapshot, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{companyId}, #{partId}, #{specDefinitionId}, #{valueText}, #{valueNumber}, #{valueBoolean}, #{selectedOptionId}, #{selectedOptionLabelSnapshot}, #{selectedOptionValueSnapshot}, NOW(6), NOW(6) )
